statusDefinitions.verified: cited range inspected against ref/ngspice/ AND the content at those lines matches the claim keyword
statusDefinitions.stale: cited range resolves to content that does NOT match the claim; notes contain a proposed corrected citation
statusDefinitions.unverified: row authored but not yet compared against ref/ngspice/; agents may write this value
statusDefinitions.missing: citation incomplete (no line range, or the ngspice file does not exist in ref/ngspice/)
